home.journeyTo: You're on your way to becoming

landing.heroTitle1: Learn the Bible daily through fun
landing.heroDesc: Bible Quiz — interactive trivia, multiplayer battles, church groups, and track your Bible learning journey. Completely free.
landing.feature1Desc: From quick trivia to memory challenges and Bible crossword puzzles.
landing.feature2Desc: Level up from 'Seeker' to 'Bible Master' through each lesson.
landing.feature3Desc: Connect with your ministry, learn together and host internal tournaments.
landing.feature4Desc: Maintain your daily Bible reading habit to earn exciting rewards.
landing.tryChallengeDesc: No registration needed — start right now with quick challenges to test your Bible knowledge.
landing.updatedRegularlyDesc: 5000+ carefully curated questions from pastors and theology professors.
landing.multiPlatformDesc: Learn on web, tablet, or mobile app anytime, anywhere.
landing.dailyChallengeDesc: 5 questions - 5 minutes. Focused on weekly events.
landing.quickPracticeDesc: Try 10 random questions from the entire Bible database.
landing.churchGroupDesc: Create a private learning space for your church, ministry, or small group. Track progress and encourage each other daily.
landing.qrJoin: Quick join via QR code for each group
landing.joinCommunity: Join a community of 50,000+ people learning the Bible every day.
landing.verseText: Your word is a lamp for my feet, a light on my path.

quiz.question: Question {{current}}/{{total}}
quiz.confirmQuit: Are you sure you want to quit? Current progress will not be saved.

practice.title: Practice
practice.bookHint: Leave empty for random questions from all 66 books.

practice.heroDesc: No pressure. No limits. Learn your way.
practice.showExplanationDesc: See why an answer is right/wrong after each question
practice.retryWrongDesc: Review the questions you missed in your last session

tips.tip1: Read the surrounding context of a verse to understand it deeper.
tips.tip2: Daily review makes memory stick longer.
tips.tip3: Start at Easy and scale up as you get comfortable.
